thresholds.Title: Tumor dose-response for resin and glass microspheres in HCC
thresholds.Key Finding:
Resin: OR ≥176 Gy, CR ≥247 Gy (mean tumor dose)
Glass: OR ≥290 Gy, CR ≥481 Gy

thresholds.Title: Radiation segmentectomy with resin microspheres: ≥300 Gy local progression 0%
thresholds.Key Finding: Resin RS ≥300 Gy → local progression rate 0%

thresholds.Title: Personalised versus standard dosimetry approach of SIRT with TheraSphere
thresholds.Key Finding: Personalized >205 Gy vs standard: OR 71% vs 36% (p<0.001)

thresholds.Title: Y-90 radiation segmentectomy for early-stage HCC
thresholds.Key Finding: Glass RS perfused ≥400 Gy → complete pathologic necrosis 대부분

thresholds.Title: SARAH trial: Y-90 resin vs sorafenib for advanced HCC
thresholds.Key Finding:
BSA model 사용. 원 trial OS 차이 없음.
Hermann 2020 후향 분석: >100 Gy OS 14.1 vs 6.1개월

thresholds.Title: Toxicity analysis of hepatic radioembolization
thresholds.Key Finding:
WL NTAD TD50 = 52 Gy (95% CI 44-61) for ≥Grade 2 hepatotoxicity
임상 관행: <40 Gy 안전 마진

thresholds.Title: Partition/voxel-based dosimetry for resin microspheres
thresholds.Key Finding:
2-3일전 calibration resin, partition/voxel dosimetry
OR: mean tumor dose 253 Gy
CR: 337 Gy

thresholds.Title: STRATUM trials — Resin tumor dose threshold
thresholds.Key Finding: Tumor dose threshold 150 Gy

thresholds.Title: Resin dose-response for OR
thresholds.Key Finding: 157 Gy → Objective response at 6 months 90%

thresholds.Title: Lung dose limits for radioembolization
thresholds.Key Finding: Session <30 Gy, Lifetime <50 Gy (Western guideline)

thresholds.Title: 2022 EJNMMI consensus on glass microsphere dosimetry
thresholds.Key Finding:
Lobectomy NTAD <120 Gy
Unilobar MF CPS A: <100 Gy, CPS B: <70 Gy
Bilobar: 40-70 Gy

thresholds.Title: 2025 EJNMMI consensus on radiation segmentectomy
thresholds.Key Finding: Glass RS ≥400 Gy (원래 non-HCC 대상, HCC는 LEGACY 근거)

thresholds.Title: Korean lung dose guidelines for radioembolization
thresholds.Key Finding:
Resin: <15 Gy/session
Glass Male: <25 Gy, Female: <20 Gy

thresholds.Title: Radioembolization of CRCLM: comparative dose-response of resin and glass
thresholds.Key Finding:
Resin vs Glass 직접 비교 (56명, 234 lesions)
Glass CR 42%, Resin CR 12%
ATD-response AUC: Glass 0.805, Resin 0.767
OS 차이 없음

thresholds.Title: Streamlining RE without LSF for colorectal liver metastases
thresholds.Key Finding:
LSF 없이 진행. Median perfused AD 136 Gy, TAD 347 Gy (T/N=3)
Post-tx PET: TAD 432 Gy (T/N 3.61)

thresholds.Title: Y-90 for Fibrolamellar HCC
thresholds.Key Finding: Fibrolamellar HCC: median tumor dose 405 Gy, 정상간 83 Gy

thresholds.Title: Optimizing Y-90 Radioembolization Dosimetry for HCC: A Korean Perspective
thresholds.Key Finding: 한국 관점 Y-90 dosimetry 최적화

thresholds.Title: Post-Treatment PET/CT Dosimetry to Predict Contralateral Lobe Hypertrophy After TARE
thresholds.Key Finding: Post-tx PET/CT voxel dosimetry로 반대쪽 간엽 비대 예측

thresholds.Title: Feasibility of Y-90 RE Without LSF Measurement for Cholangiocarcinoma
thresholds.Key Finding: 담관암 LSF 없이 Y-90 시행 feasibility

thresholds.Title: Tumor dose as oncologic predictor in HCC treated with resin Y-90
thresholds.Key Finding:
Tumor ≥250 Gy → OS/PFS 연장
Nontumoral liver >103 Gy → Grade 3+ AE (lobar)

thresholds.Title: Dosimetric optimization and evaluation of HCC treatment effect prediction
thresholds.Key Finding:
ROC 분석: 233.2 Gy = CR 최적 threshold
정상간 dose와 AE 상관 없음(이 코호트)

thresholds.Title: Impact of radiation dose and tumour burden on outcomes: 413-patient cohort
thresholds.Key Finding:
Tumor ≥150 Gy: OS 32.2 vs 17.5개월 (p<0.001)
413명 11년 데이터

thresholds.Title: Tumor absorbed dose predicts survival in CRLM treated with Y-90
thresholds.Key Finding:
Weighted tumor dose ≥120 Gy: OS 개선
231명, 329 sessions

thresholds.Journal: Eur J Nucl Med Mol Imaging
thresholds.Title: Clinical and dosimetric considerations for glass RE of ICC, mCRC, mNET
thresholds.Key Finding:
Expert Committee:
RS ≥400 Gy, Lobectomy 150 Gy
NT ≤75 Gy
iCCA ≥205 Gy, mCRC/mNET 150-200 Gy

thresholds.Title: Role of resin Y-90 dosimetry in predicting outcome in CRLM
thresholds.Key Finding:
Mean TD ≥100 Gy: OS 19 vs 11개월 (p=0.016)
REILD rate 4.4%

thresholds.Title: High-dose RE with resin limited by lung shunt for localized HCC
thresholds.Key Finding:
vTAD ≥600 Gy: complete radiological response threshold
160 HCC, lung shunt limiting
thresholds.Notes: vTAD 기반 (mean TD와 직접 비교 불가)

thresholds.Title: Radiation segmentectomy for caudate lobe primary hepatic malignancies
thresholds.Key Finding:
Median dose 596 Gy → 100% CR
8명 (6 HCC, 2 ICC), 합병증 Grade 1만

thresholds.Journal: Q J Nucl Med Mol Imaging
thresholds.Title: Toxicity comparison of Y-90 resin and glass microspheres
thresholds.Key Finding:
REILD G3+: resin NTAD 43.5 vs 33.3 Gy
Post-embolization syndrome resin에 더 흔함

thresholds.Title: Clinical impact of resin RE-induced hepatic AE and associations with predictive dosimetry
thresholds.Key Finding:
REILD group NTAD 33 Gy (안전 한계 이하에서도 발생)
ALBI ≥2 → 간독성 예측
REILD OS 5.1개월

thresholds.Journal: Eur J Nucl Med Mol Imaging
thresholds.Title: ML models for REILD prediction and new bilirubin threshold
thresholds.Key Finding:
ML: 빌리루빈 >26.5 μmol/L (1.55 mg/dL) → 독성 위험
138 HCC, tumor dose가 outcome 예측 주요 변수

cases.Title: Severe gastric ulceration following RE for HCC
cases.Complication:
위궤양 → 패혈증 → 사망
조직: 위 점막 내 Y-90 microsphere 확인
cases.Clinical Lesson: 비표적 색전의 치명적 결과. 좌엽 치료 시 위 동맥 확인 필수

cases.Title: Prolonged radiation-induced gastritis following Y-90 RE
cases.Complication:
지연성 방사선 위염
내시경: 미란성 위점막, 혈관내 microsphere
Vonoprazan으로 호전
cases.Clinical Lesson: 지연성 GI 독성 가능. 시술 후 소화기 증상 모니터링 필요

cases.Title: GI AE incidence after left lobe radiation segmentectomy
cases.Complication:
Grade 1 GI AE: 30% (14/46)
Grade 2: 4% (다발성 위/십이지장 궤양)
cases.Clinical Lesson: ⚠️ Left lobe RS에서 GI AE 30%. 좌엽 시술 시 반드시 고려

cases.Title: Fatal Y-90 pneumonitis after radioembolisation
cases.Clinical Lesson: Lung dose 기준 준수에도 발생 가능

cases.Title: Radiation pneumonitis after Y-90 RE: systematic review
cases.Complication:
48건 방사선 폐렴
사망률 40%
Glass가 Resin보다 폐 선량 높음
발생 중앙값 3개월
cases.Clinical Lesson: ⚠️ 폐렴 사망률 매우 높음. LSF 엄격 관리 필수

cases.Title: Hepatopulmonary shunt reduction after bevacizumab
cases.Complication:
Atezolizumab/bevacizumab 후 LSF 42% → 3.4% 감소
TARE 가능해짐
cases.Clinical Lesson: 높은 LSF에서 bevacizumab으로 shunt 감소 가능

cases.Title: TARE complicated by mycotic aneurysm and bleeding
cases.Complication:
시술 후 간농양 → 진균성 동맥류 → 파열
Near-catastrophic event
cases.Clinical Lesson: 극히 드문 감염→혈관 합병증 연쇄. 시술 후 발열 시 적극 대응

cases.Title: Durvalumab-induced ITP in CCA patients undergoing Y-90
cases.Complication:
면역 혈소판감소증 (ITP) 2건
고용량 스테로이드 + IVIG 치료
cases.Clinical Lesson: ⚠️ 면역항암제+TARE 병합 시 ITP 위험 인지

cases.Title: Advanced HCC TARE and transplant in 22-month-old
cases.Complication:
소아 TARE: Milan 초과 HCC에서 이식 가교
성공적 이식
cases.Clinical Lesson: 극히 드문 소아 TARE 사례. 이식 가교 가능

cases.Title: Robotic hepatectomy for recurrent tumor after Y-90
cases.Complication: Y-90 후 수술: 밀집 문주위 섬유화, 염증, 위축-비대 복합, 유착 증가
cases.Clinical Lesson: Y-90 후 수술 시 해부학적 변형 예상 필요

cases.Title: Hepatic embolization for Cushing syndrome from metastatic tumors
cases.Complication:
Y-90으로 쿠싱증후군 생화학적 조절
일시적 부신부전 합병증
cases.Clinical Lesson: 기능적 적응증: 호르몬 분비 종양의 Y-90 사용

cases.Title: Triple-modality approach overcoming prohibitive HPS for massive HCC
cases.Complication:
동정맥루 색전 + DEB-TACE + 전신요법 후 HPS 감소
Y-90 시행 → R0 절제 성공
cases.Clinical Lesson: 높은 shunt: 다중 모달리티로 극복 가능

cases.Title: Safety of repeated TARE with multi-compartment dosimetry
cases.Complication:
1-2차 치료: G3-4 독성 없음
3차 이후: 유의한 변화
ALBI score와 누적 선량 상관 (glass)
cases.Clinical Lesson: 반복 TARE: 3회차부터 독성 증가. 누적 선량 모니터링

cases.Title: Safety of SIRT with glass after failed repeated TACE
cases.Clinical Lesson: 반복 TACE 실패 후 TARE: 비교적 안전하나 11% G3+ 주의

cases.Title: Factors impacting survival after TARE: CIRT study
cases.Complication:
AE 36.7%, G3+ 9.7%
Partition model OS HR 0.65 vs BSA
cases.Clinical Lesson: 대규모 전향적: Partition model이 BSA 대비 OS 개선

cases.Title: TARE following IPA glue embolization for flow redistribution
cases.Complication:
담낭염 5.4%, PT 연장 2.7%, AKI 2.7%
방사선 폐렴 2.7%
cases.Clinical Lesson: Flow redistribution 후 TARE: 담낭염이 가장 흔한 합병증

cases.Title: Endoscopic biopsy diagnosis of TARE-related gastric injury
cases.Complication: 내시경 생검에서 방사선 유발 GI 손상 진단 기준 제시
cases.Clinical Lesson: 비표적 색전 의심 시 내시경 생검 진단 기준 참고
